ipxact:component.ipxact:name: LCD_CTRL

ipxact:register.ipxact:name: LCD_CTRL
ipxact:register.ipxact:description: Master enable. Clears cleanly with SOFT_RST.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: LCD_EN
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Master enable. Clears cleanly with SOFT_RST.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: DMA_EN
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Enable DMA engine for autonomous frame fetch from system memory.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: TE_EN
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Enable TE synchronization. Frame trigger waits for TE edge.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: CMD_SEQ_EN
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Enable auto CASET/PASET/RAMWR sequence before pixel burst.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: STREAM_MODE
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: CS# stays LOW across frames, CMD skipped after first. Latch-at-trigger.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: PARTIAL_EN
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Enable partial update region (LCD_PU_X/Y). Latched at trigger.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: BYTE_SWAP
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: 0=MSB first (GC9306X native), 1=LSB first. Latched at trigger.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: FB_SEL
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Latched at trigger. Select active frame buffer: 0=FB0, 1=FB1.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: SOFT_RST
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Self-clearing. Resets all internal state except RESX output.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: FORCE_CMD
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Self-clearing. Forces immediate CMD FIFO drain, bypassing frame FSM.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: DMA_SRC
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Pixel source: 0=DMA engine (default), 1=AXI slave port. Idle-only change.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: AUTO_BUF_SEL
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: AXI slave buffer routing: 1=auto-route to AXI_OWN buffer, 0=explicit AWADDR. Idle-only change.

ipxact:register.ipxact:name: LCD_STATUS
ipxact:register.ipxact:description: Set when complete frame transmitted to display. Write 1 to clear.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: FRAME_DONE
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Set when complete frame transmitted to display. Write 1 to clear.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: CMD_DONE
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Set when CMD FIFO drains completely. Write 1 to clear.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: FRAME_LATE
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Set when new TE edge arrives before current frame completes. Write 1 to clear.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: ADDR_OOB
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Set when DMA address exceeds validated AXI region. Write 1 to clear.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: STRIDE_ERR
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: STRIDE too small or not aligned. DMA aborted. Write 1 to clear.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: AXI_ERR
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Set on AXI RRESP != OKAY during DMA burst. ERR_ADDR latched. Write 1 to clear.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: FIFO_UNDERRUN
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: TX FIFO emptied mid-row during SPI drain. Critical. Write 1 to clear.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: TE_TIMEOUT
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: TE_TIMEOUT period expired with no TE edge. Write 1 to clear.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: MODE_SWITCH_ERR
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: SPI_CFG written while SPI_BUSY=1. Write 1 to clear.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: SPI_BUSY
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Live: SPI engine is actively clocking data.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: DMA_BUSY
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Live: DMA engine is performing AXI read burst.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: FRAME_ACTIVE
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Live: Frame transfer in progress (DMA+SPI inclusive).

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: CMD_BUSY
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Live: Command path is draining CMD FIFO.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: RESX_ACTIVE
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Live: RESX pulse or post-reset delay in progress.

ipxact:register.ipxact:name: LCD_IRQ_EN
ipxact:register.ipxact:description: Enable FRAME_DONE interrupt.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: FRAME_DONE_EN
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Enable FRAME_DONE interrupt.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: CMD_DONE_EN
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Enable CMD_DONE interrupt.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: FRAME_LATE_EN
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Enable FRAME_LATE interrupt.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: ADDR_OOB_EN
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Enable ADDR_OOB interrupt.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: STRIDE_ERR_EN
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Enable STRIDE_ERR interrupt.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: AXI_ERR_EN
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Enable AXI_ERR interrupt.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: FIFO_UNDERRUN_EN
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Enable FIFO_UNDERRUN interrupt.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: TE_TIMEOUT_EN
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Enable TE_TIMEOUT interrupt.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: MODE_SWITCH_ERR_EN
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Enable MODE_SWITCH_ERR interrupt.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: CMD_HALF_EMPTY_EN
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Enable IRQ when CMD FIFO drops below half-full.

ipxact:register.ipxact:name: LCD_FB0_ADDR
ipxact:register.ipxact:description: AXI base address of frame buffer 0. Bits[1:0] must be 0. Latched at DMA trigger.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: FB0_ADDR
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: AXI base address of frame buffer 0. Bits[1:0] must be 0. Latched at DMA trigger.

ipxact:register.ipxact:name: LCD_FB1_ADDR
ipxact:register.ipxact:description: AXI base address of frame buffer 1. Bits[1:0] must be 0. Latched at DMA trigger.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: FB1_ADDR
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: AXI base address of frame buffer 1. Bits[1:0] must be 0. Latched at DMA trigger.

ipxact:register.ipxact:name: LCD_STRIDE
ipxact:register.ipxact:description: Row stride in bytes. QVGA=480, VGA=1280. Multiple of AXI data width. Latched at DMA trigger.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: STRIDE
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Row stride in bytes. QVGA=480, VGA=1280. Multiple of AXI data width. Latched at DMA trigger.

ipxact:register.ipxact:name: LCD_PU_X
ipxact:register.ipxact:description: Start column 0-based inclusive. SC value for CASET. Latched at DMA trigger.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: PU_X_START
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Start column 0-based inclusive. SC value for CASET. Latched at DMA trigger.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: PU_X_END
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: End column 0-based inclusive. EC value for CASET. Latched at DMA trigger.

ipxact:register.ipxact:name: LCD_PU_Y
ipxact:register.ipxact:description: Start row 0-based inclusive. SP value for PASET. Latched at DMA trigger.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: PU_Y_START
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Start row 0-based inclusive. SP value for PASET. Latched at DMA trigger.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: PU_Y_END
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: End row 0-based inclusive. EP value for PASET. Latched at DMA trigger.

ipxact:register.ipxact:name: LCD_SPI_CFG
ipxact:register.ipxact:description: SPI clock divider. SCK = sys_clk / (2*(SPI_DIV+1)). GC9306X target: SPI_DIV=4 @ 100MHz -> 10MHz.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: SPI_DIV
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: SPI clock divider. SCK = sys_clk / (2*(SPI_DIV+1)). GC9306X target: SPI_DIV=4 @ 100MHz -> 10MHz.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: SPI_MODE
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: SPI clock polarity/phase: 0=Mode0(CPOL=0/CPHA=0), 1=Mode1, 2=Mode2, 3=Mode3.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: WIRE_3
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: 0=4-wire SPI (separate spi_dc pin), 1=3-wire SPI (D/C embedded as 9th bit).

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: CS_SETUP
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: CS# setup cycles between CS# assertion and first SCK edge. Min 3 @ 100MHz (30ns >= GC9306X 20ns).

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: CS_HOLD
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: CS# hold cycles between last SCK edge and CS# de-assertion. Min 5 @ 100MHz (50ns >= GC9306X 40ns).

ipxact:register.ipxact:name: LCD_TE_CFG
ipxact:register.ipxact:description: Bresenham numerator: target FPS (e.g. 24). Divider passes TE_FPS_NUM of every TE_FPS_DEN pulses.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: TE_FPS_NUM
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Bresenham numerator: target FPS (e.g. 24). Divider passes TE_FPS_NUM of every TE_FPS_DEN pulses.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: TE_FPS_DEN
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Bresenham denominator: display TE rate in Hz (e.g. 60). 0 treated as 1 (divide-by-zero protection).

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: TE_TIMEOUT
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Timeout in TE periods (10ms units @ 100MHz). 0=disabled. If no TE edge, assert TE_TIMEOUT IRQ.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: TE_POL
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: TE input polarity: 0=trigger on rising edge (GC9306X default, V-blank HIGH), 1=falling edge.

ipxact:register.ipxact:name: LCD_RESX_CFG0
ipxact:register.ipxact:description: RESX pulse width in sys_clk cycles. GC9306X requires >= 10us low (1000 cycles @ 100MHz).

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: RESX_WIDTH
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: RESX pulse width in sys_clk cycles. GC9306X requires >= 10us low (1000 cycles @ 100MHz).

ipxact:register.ipxact:name: LCD_RESX_CFG1
ipxact:register.ipxact:description: Delay in sys_clk cycles after RESX de-assertion before RESX_DONE is set. GC9306X requires >= 5ms.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: RESX_DELAY
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Delay in sys_clk cycles after RESX de-assertion before RESX_DONE is set. GC9306X requires >= 5ms.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: RESX_ASSERT
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Self-clearing. Write 1 to trigger RESX pulse sequence. Cleared when sequence starts.

ipxact:register.ipxact:name: LCD_CMD_FIFO
ipxact:register.ipxact:description: Write-only FIFO push port. Bits[7:0]=CMD_BYTE, Bits[23:16]=PAYLOAD_LEN. Hardware decodes internally.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: CMD_ENTRY
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Write-only FIFO push port. Bits[7:0]=CMD_BYTE, Bits[23:16]=PAYLOAD_LEN. Hardware decodes internally.

ipxact:register.ipxact:name: LCD_CMD_STATUS
ipxact:register.ipxact:description: Current number of entries in CMD FIFO (0-63).

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: CMD_FIFO_LEVEL
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Current number of entries in CMD FIFO (0-63).

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: CMD_FIFO_FULL
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Asserted when CMD FIFO contains 64 entries.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: CMD_FIFO_EMPTY
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Asserted when CMD FIFO is empty.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: CMD_FIFO_HALF_EMPTY
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Asserted when CMD FIFO level < 32. Use with CMD_HALF_EMPTY_EN for IRQ-driven write.

ipxact:register.ipxact:name: LCD_ERR_ADDR
ipxact:register.ipxact:description: AXI read address that triggered last DMA fault (ADDR_OOB or AXI_ERR). Debug use.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: ERR_ADDR
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: AXI read address that triggered last DMA fault (ADDR_OOB or AXI_ERR). Debug use.

ipxact:register.ipxact:name: LCD_VERSION
ipxact:register.ipxact:description: Minor version number. Synthesis parameter IP_VER_MINOR. Default 0x00 for v1.0.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: IP_VER_MINOR
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Minor version number. Synthesis parameter IP_VER_MINOR. Default 0x00 for v1.0.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: IP_VER_MAJOR
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Major version number. Synthesis parameter IP_VER_MAJOR. Default 0x01 for v1.x.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: IP_ID
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: IP identifier constant. Synthesis parameter IP_ID. Default 0xAC1D for silicon ID.

ipxact:register.ipxact:name: LCD_INFO
ipxact:register.ipxact:description: Max column count from synthesis parameter MAX_COL. Default 240 for QVGA, 640 for VGA.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: MAX_COL
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Max column count from synthesis parameter MAX_COL. Default 240 for QVGA, 640 for VGA.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: MAX_ROW
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Max row count from synthesis parameter MAX_ROW. Default 320 for QVGA, 480 for VGA.

ipxact:register.ipxact:name: LCD_FRAME_CTRL
ipxact:register.ipxact:description: Write 1 to trigger a frame. Self-clearing. TE mode: arms trigger, DMA starts on next qualifying TE edge.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: FRAME_READY
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Write 1 to trigger a frame. Self-clearing. TE mode: arms trigger, DMA starts on next qualifying TE edge.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: FRAME_COUNT
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Rolling 8-bit frame counter. Incremented on each FRAME_DONE. Wraps 255->0. Frame-rate measurement.

ipxact:register.ipxact:name: LCD_LINEBUF_STATUS
ipxact:register.ipxact:description: Line buffer A is full (DMA fill complete for this row).

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: BUF_A_FULL
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Line buffer A is full (DMA fill complete for this row).

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: BUF_B_FULL
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Line buffer B is full.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: BUF_A_EMPTY
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Line buffer A is empty (SPI drain complete).

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: BUF_B_EMPTY
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Line buffer B is empty.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: ACTIVE_WR_BUF
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Current DMA write target: 0=Buffer A, 1=Buffer B.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: ACTIVE_RD_BUF
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Current SPI read source: 0=Buffer A, 1=Buffer B.

ipxact:register.ipxact:name: LCD_SLAVE_BUFA_ADDR
ipxact:register.ipxact:description: AXI slave Buffer A base address in SoC memory map. Set at integration time via parameter.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: BUFA_ADDR
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: AXI slave Buffer A base address in SoC memory map. Set at integration time via parameter.

ipxact:register.ipxact:name: LCD_SLAVE_BUFB_ADDR
ipxact:register.ipxact:description: AXI slave Buffer B base address in SoC memory map. = BUFA_ADDR + LINE_BUF_SIZE.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: BUFB_ADDR
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: AXI slave Buffer B base address in SoC memory map. = BUFA_ADDR + LINE_BUF_SIZE.

ipxact:register.ipxact:name: LCD_SLAVE_INFO
ipxact:register.ipxact:description: AXI slave total aperture size in bytes. = 2 * LINE_BUF_SIZE. QVGA: 1024 (0x400), VGA: 4096 (0x1000).

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: APERTURE_SIZE
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: AXI slave total aperture size in bytes. = 2 * LINE_BUF_SIZE. QVGA: 1024 (0x400), VGA: 4096 (0x1000).

ipxact:component.ipxact:description: SPI LCD Controller with Integrated DMA Engine - GC9306X primary target
